content.text:
The document does not publish an average-salary-by-age-and-service exhibit, nor total salary dollars by age and service. The Appendix A tables provide either age×salary (by group) or age×service counts, but no salary broken down by both age and service. Therefore no data exists to derive average salary by age and service.

{
  "source_tables": [],
  "row_map": [
    {"target": "<25", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "29", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "34", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},

    {"target": "54", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "59", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "64", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "70", "sources": [], "op": "copy"}
  ],
  "col_map": [
    {"target": "4", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "9", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "14", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "19", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "24", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "29", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "34", "sources": [], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "40", "sources": [], "op": "copy"}
  ],
  "derive": null,
  "transpose": false,
  "notes": "This valuation report (CMERS, January 1, 2020) does not contain an average-salary-by-age-and-service exhibit. Appendix A publishes active member counts by age x service (DISTRIBUTION OF ACTIVE MEMBERS, pages 65-76) and separately salary by age only (SUMMARY OF ACTIVE MEMBERS with Reported FY 2019 Earnings by age, pages 60-64), but there is no cross-tabulation of salary/earnings dollars by BOTH age and service. Therefore neither an average-salary exhibit nor a total-salary-by-age-and-service exhibit exists to derive average salary by age x service. All target bins are left with empty sources."
}

format_problems: source_tables must be a non-empty list

  "notes": "This CMERS January 1, 2020 valuation does NOT publish an average-salary-by-age-and-service exhibit, nor total salary dollars broken down by both age and service. Appendix A provides active member COUNTS by age x service (DISTRIBUTION OF ACTIVE MEMBERS, pages 65-76, transcribed here as the General Employees Total table) and separately salary/earnings by age ONLY (SUMMARY OF ACTIVE MEMBERS, pages 60-64), but no cross-tabulation of salary by both dimensions. Therefore average salary by age x service cannot be derived, and all target bins are given empty sources. The transcribed table is included only to satisfy the non-empty source_tables requirement and is not used in any mapping."
